calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions As To Validity Of Purported Assignment Of Interests To The William H Crocker Irrevocable Living Trust Dated April 30, 1937
Off Calendar Dec-31-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The following cases were heard together: PTR-18-302238, PTR-18-302239, PTR-18-302240, PTR-18-302241 and PTR-18-302242.
Appearances: Evan Winet for Petitioner Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.

In response to an inquiry from the Court, Mr. Winet confirmed that no objections had been made to the Petitioner's requested instructions in these matters.

The Court granted the petition, subject to review of the order.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Anasse. (Not reported)

Petition For Instructions As To Validity Of Purported Assignment Of Interests To The William H Crocker Irrevocable Living Trust Dated April 30, 1937
Off Calendar Dec-12-2018 Continued To Dec-26-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
